underlying_goal: Migrate a legacy PHP 7.0 website to PHP 8.2, fixing compatibility issues, updating dependencies, replacing deprecated packages, and hardening security.
friction_detail: Assistant started making changes autonomously to fix Caddy routing before user stopped them; one initial Illuminate fix was incomplete.
brief_summary: User successfully migrated a legacy PHP 7.0 website to PHP 8.2 with the assistant fixing compatibility errors, updating frontend/backend dependencies, replacing deprecated auth library, and installing PHPStan.
user_instructions_to_assistant: Investigate first, inform, and wait for confirmation before making changes
Don't change anything, just do a review
Use subagents for research before acting
